hypothesis: VIX-regime-conditional DAY+SIDE directional system: classify the VIX regime (level vs trailing-median + 5-bar slope sign) at/near the open, take the established morning VWAP day-trend side directionally ONLY in the favorable (LOW + not-rising) VIX regime. Distilled from edge#2 (day+side) + ML feature ranking (VIX #1, vix_slope5 #2) + the vwap VIX-gate. Tested on BOTH 0DTE real-fills (ITM-2 + ATM tiers) and futures point-P&L (MES + MNQ). All 8 anti-2.10 gates.

convergence_inputs.edge2_divergence: MES->MNQ trade-the-laggard on day-trend side cleared 5/6 gates, failed only drop-top5
convergence_inputs.vwap_vix_gate: the live vwap_continuation edge is VIX-conditional

signal_config.causality: VIX median = trailing rolling median over PRIOR bars (shift 1); slope causal; day-side from first TREND_BARS closes; entry fills NEXT bar open

gate_definitions.3: top-5 winning days < 200% of total P&L
gate_definitions.5: drop-top5-days per-trade > 0 (the gate the divergence lead failed)

arena_0dte.real_fills_authority: lib.simulator_real.simulate_trade_real (C1); nearest-cached strike <=4; causal next-bar-open; chart-stop = 12-bar swing

arena_futures.exit: atr_trail (chart-stop floor + chandelier 2.5x); hard EOD flat
arena_futures.vix_note: VIX ffilled onto futures bars; futures span to 2026-06-12 (VIX file to 2026-05-22)

headline.robust_note: the trustworthy result: the clearing (cell,tier) with the largest OOS-N. ITM-2 SURVIVOR cells that 'clear' are FLAGGED below if they are truncation-artifacts (chart-stop-only OOS sign flips negative).
headline.highest_oos_per_trade_survivor_caveat: auto-picks max OOS per-trade -> tends to a high-low_margin, LOW-OOS-N (over-concentrated) cell; prefer robust_clearing_cell
headline.futures_verdict: NO futures cell clears all 8 (most OOS-negative) -> the captured edge lives in the 0DTE ATM option structure, NOT as a pure point-direction edge

DISCLOSURE.pure_python: no sklearn; numpy only; $0; no live orders; markets closed
DISCLOSURE.per_trade: per-trade expectancy reported, not WR alone (OP-14/C4)
DISCLOSURE.is_oos: IS=2025 / OOS=2026 chronological split; gate 1 (OOS per-trade>0) decisive
DISCLOSURE.drop_top5_gate: gate 5 is THE gate the edge#2 divergence lead failed; the rescue MUST clear it
DISCLOSURE.no_leakage: VIX median trailing-shifted; slope causal; day-side from first 3 closes; next-bar fill (C6)
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: C3/L58 SPY-direction edge != option edge -> tested in BOTH theta-free futures + real 0DTE
DISCLOSURE.null: 0DTE: null_baseline.null_gate (beat MAX + drop5>mean); futures: matched random-bar mean (L172)
DISCLOSURE.truncation: 0DTE: same-strike chart-stop-only sign; futures: chart-stop+EOD sign (L171)
DISCLOSURE.no_survivor_pick: ALL cells x both arenas x both tiers reported with exact pass/fail flags
